sandboxEnv.fieldValueEdit: New value (leave blank to keep current)

sandboxEnv.validNameFormat: Use letters, digits, or underscores; must start with a letter or underscore
sandboxEnv.validHostRequired: At least one host is required for secrets

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.subtitle: Run prompts automatically when events arrive via webhook.
triggers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the trigger and all its event history.
triggers.emptyHint: Create a trigger to get an ingest URL, then paste it into your event source's webhook settings.
triggers.selectHint: Select a trigger to view its details.
triggers.fieldWebhookSecretHint: Save this secret now — we won't show it again.
triggers.fieldPromptTemplateHint: Use [[ jsonpath ]] style placeholders for whitelisted payload fields (double curly braces in the actual template).
triggers.fieldPayloadFieldsHint: Comma-separated JSONPath expressions. Only these fields are interpolated into the template.
triggers.ingestUrlHint: Paste this URL into your source provider's webhook settings.
triggers.secretManagementHint: Rotate the webhook secret with an overlap window to avoid dropped events.
triggers.enabledSwitchHint: Disable to stop processing incoming events without deleting the trigger.
triggers.saveSecretWarning: Save the new secret now — we won't show it again after rotation.
triggers.overlapSecondsHint: The old secret remains valid for this many seconds after rotation. Default: 86400 (24h).

mcpAdmin.distributionNoneHint: Install at org level only. Workspaces will see this connector but it stays disabled until each workspace enables it.
mcpAdmin.distributionAllHint: Install and enable for every existing workspace, and auto-enable for new workspaces created later.
mcpAdmin.customCreateSubtitle: Register a custom MCP server for the entire organization. You can enable it per workspace afterwards.

panel.description: Connect your team's IM platforms and manage bot accounts.

prereq.app: Create a Discord application at discord.com/developers/applications
prereq.bot: Add a Bot to the application and copy the bot token

prereq.scopes: In OAuth2 → URL Generator, select these scopes
prereq.permissions: In the Bot Permissions section below, grant these permissions
